title: ICAI Restores 2798 CAs to Register of Members Retrospectively
content:
# ICAI Restores 2798 CAs to Register of Members Retrospectively

Ek important update hai Chartered Accountants ke liye! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne 2798 Chartered Accountants ko Register of Members mein retrospectively restore karne ka announcement kiya hai. Yeh move un CAs ke liye relief ki baat hai jinke names earlier register se remove ho gaye the.

*   **What happened:** 2798 Chartered Accountants ke names ko ICAI ke Register of Members mein officially restore kar diya gaya hai.
*   **Effective Date:** Yeh restoration retrospective effect se hua hai.
*   **Reason for Action:** ICAI ne yeh action Chartered Accountants Regulations, 1988 ke Regulation 19 aur Regulation 20 ke under liya hai.
*   **Official Reference:** Is restoration ke regarding Notification No. 3NCA(5)/1/2023-2024 dated March 21, 2026, release kiya gaya hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/category/announcements)

*Published on: 9 May 2026*
